title: 工具执行失败: search_code
content:
[SEARCH] 搜索结果: 共找到 35 处匹配，分布在 5 个文件中

================================================================================

[FILE] test_compressed_session_state.py (3 处匹配)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    [上下文]
      19 |             "content": "调用写文件工具",
>>>   20 |             "tool_calls": [
      21 |                 {"id": "call_write", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "write_full_file", "arguments": '{"path":"core/compression_engine.py"}'}}
    [上下文]
      27 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "❌ 测试失败: AssertionError in tests/test_compressed_session_state.py"},
>>>   28 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "修复后 ✅ 2 passed in 0.10s。注意: 不要保留半截 assistant.tool_calls/tool 响应"},
      29 |     ]
    [上下文]
      84 |     assert "压缩后的会话状态" in result.metadata["compressed_state_prompt"]
>>>   85 |     assert "tool_calls" not in result.summary.summary_text
      86 |     assert engine._validate_message_ordering(result.compressed_messages)

[FILE] test_compression_engine.py (3 处匹配)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    [上下文]
      49 |             elif i % 3 == 1:
>>>   50 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"回复 {i}", "tool_calls": [{"id": f"tc_{i}", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "bash", "arguments": ""}}]})
      51 |             else:
    [上下文]

>>>   59 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"回复 {i}", "tool_calls": [{"id": f"tc_{i}", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "bash", "arguments": ""}}]})
      60 |             elif i % 4 == 2:
    [上下文]
      69 |             else:
>>>   70 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"工具调用 {i}", "tool_calls": [{"id": f"tc_{i}", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "bash", "arguments": ""}}]})
      71 |                 messages.append({"role": "tool", "content": f"工具结果 {i}", "tool_call_id": f"tc_{i}"})
